name: Neck surgery needed from work injury, does comp cover it?

mainEntity.name: Neck surgery needed from work injury, does comp cover it?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if doctor deems necessary and causally related; comp pays reasonable care.** But must follow referral chain.[2] Key factors: Prior authorization often; disputes lead to IME; future care included. Idaho cases deny if unproven link.[2] Appeal denials.
